name: Male Re-education Centre
description:
Women have finally taken over the seats of political and economic power across the world, resulting in the long awaited matriarchy. Subsequently, men are now second class citizens and must attend mandatory Male Re-education Centres. These centres have a dual purpose; the first being to reeducate men on how to best serve women and the matriarchy, and the second purpose is to promote reconciliation. The latter gives women who have suffered at the hands of men to visit these centres and exact revenge on any men they choose.

Each Centre has a range of female staff members and visitors who will endeavour to make your stay unbearable.
